profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHelp: Your email address cannot be changed

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.slugHelp: Used in URLs. Cannot be changed.
workspace.readOnly: Only workspace admins can change these settings

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage who has access to this workspace
members.count: {count, plural, =0 {No members} one {1 member} other {{count} members}}
members.addDescription: Add an existing Quaynt user to this workspace by email
members.roleHelp: Choose the role for this member
members.addSuccess: {name} has been added to the workspace
members.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from this workspace? They will lose access to all workspace data.

roleDescriptions.admin: Can manage members, settings, and all resources
roleDescriptions.member: Can view and use workspace resources

adapters.title: Platform Adapters
adapters.description: Configure which AI platforms Quaynt monitors
adapters.count: {count, plural, =0 {No adapters} one {1 adapter} other {{count} adapters}}

empty.title: No adapters configured
empty.description: Add your first AI platform adapter to start monitoring

form.credentialHelp: Credentials are encrypted at rest and never displayed after saving

health.costWarning: Health checks for SERP-based adapters incur a small API cost (~$0.003 per check)

adapters.deleteConfirm: Deleting "{name}" will stop all monitoring for this platform. This cannot be undone.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage programmatic access to the Quaynt API
apiKeys.count: {count, plural, =0 {No API keys} one {1 API key} other {{count} API keys}}

empty.title: No API keys
empty.description: Generate an API key to access the Quaynt API programmatically

form.title: Generate API Key
form.scopeHelp: Controls what this key can access

scopeDescriptions.read: Can read data but cannot make changes

generated.title: API Key Generated
generated.warning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
generated.closeConfirm: Are you sure? The key will not be shown again.

apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoking "{name}" will immediately invalidate this key. Any integrations using it will stop working.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Receive real-time notifications when events occur in Quaynt
webhooks.count: {count, plural, =0 {No webhooks} one {1 webhook} other {{count} webhooks}}

empty.title: No webhooks
empty.description: Add a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications

form.eventsHelp: Select which events trigger this webhook
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What this webhook is used for

secret.title: Webhook Secret
secret.info: Use this secret to verify webhook signatures. Copy it now; it will not be shown again.
secret.rotateConfirm: Rotating the secret will invalidate the current one. Update your webhook handler before rotating.

webhooks.testDisabled: Enable the webhook to send test events
webhooks.deleteConfirm: Delete this webhook endpoint? Pending deliveries will be discarded.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email. They need to sign up first.

errors.cannotRemoveSoleOwner: Cannot remove the sole workspace owner
errors.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role
errors.cannotRemoveSelf: You cannot remove yourself from the workspace

errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to view these settings
errors.platformDuplicate: An adapter for this platform already exists

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or fewer
